title: Atropos read-only supersession-consistency verifier — frozen semantics over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded

authority.note: read-only verifier (The Eye's ruling); per-entity-kind surface scope + design-not-governance classification resolved via peer-model (codex) collaboration adopted as The Eye's ruling

input: CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json (read as data). Populated supersession surface = #superseded (plan-version retirements). Node-backed surfaces (SUPERSEDED records, weave supersedes edges) are 0 and DEFERRED.
classification: each #superseded entry -> plan-version | node-backed (UNREPRESENTABLE, deferred) | unknown (UNSUPPORTED_RETIREMENT_KIND)

checks: closed entry shape {plan_version, sha256:<64hex>, authorization:authz-N, authz_status:AUTHORIZED|NOT_AUTHORIZED, superseded_by, must_not_govern_new_work===true} + optional note:string
unique plan_version; active_plan.version not itself superseded
superseded_by resolves with no self / dangling / cycle; chain terminates at active_plan.version
file-level anomalies throw; malformed individual entries -> inconsistent (never silent-skip)
normative_verdict.golden: the real 4 entries (v11 authz-004 NOT_AUTHORIZED, v12 authz-005, v13 authz-006, v14 authz-007 NOT_AUTHORIZED) all superseded_by v15 (active) -> `consistent`

advisory: read-only report (retired versions + deferred/unknown); input to TELOS/The Eye, never enforced. Atropos never mutates CURRENT-AUTHORITY.

oracle.test: atropos/scripts/test-verify.mjs (golden real authority + per-defect negatives) + atropos/scripts/test-readonly.mjs (executable read-only static scan); `npm test` in atropos/ (31 assertions)

change_rule: Any change to the verifier semantics or the surface scope requires a plan amendment (Daedalus) + TELOS re-authorization + updated oracle + adversarial review.
